title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker18: Kconfig.defconfig
close_reason: Removed duplicate LICHEN_DUTY_CYCLE config definitions from hal/Kconfig and l2/Kconfig to resolve multiple-location Kconfig merge conflict from parallel worker edits.
